assessment.note: Names a specific absence — substantive feedback on key decisions — suggesting the pace strain is tied to low support and leaving engagement mildly dented; also flags a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that would help most?
new_queue.description: Drills into the missing substantive feedback Lin named and surfaces the specific gap.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Keep or delegate
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should own right now?
new_queue.description: Gets at ownership boundaries and the rationale for keeping work close.

new_queue.label: Closer next step
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Ends on an open next-step focus without opening a new topic.
